mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO traffic_flow_log (link_id, road_name, speed, congestion_level, direction, route_no, collected_at) VALUES
(#{item.linkId}, #{item.roadName}, #{item.speed}, #{item.congestionLevel}, #{item.direction}, #{item.routeNo}, #{item.collectedAt})
mapper.select: SELECT flow_id, link_id, road_name, speed, congestion_level, direction, route_no, collected_at, created_at FROM traffic_flow_log ORDER BY collected_at DESC LIMIT #{limit}
